title: Venezuelan Empanada Filling
description: A delicious and easy-to-make filling for empanadas, inspired by the flavors of Venezuela.
instructions: Mash the plantain and mix with minced onion and garlic.
Add the Venezuelan cheese and mix until well combined.
Place the empanada dough on a floured surface and roll out to about 1/4 inch thickness.
Use a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass to cut out circles of dough.
Place a tablespoon of the cheese mixture in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal.
Brush the tops with a little water and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
